evidence.rule_summary_from_author: LockingInfo is an object table with exactly one row; UID, Name, Version, EncryptSupport, MaxRanges, and MaxReEncryptions columns are defined in that row and each SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host. Therefore a final SUCCESS response for host Set on any of those columns is not protocol-compliant; this case does not infer the exact non-success status.

source_snippets.text: 5.7.2.1 LockingInfo (Object Table) The LockingInfo table is an object table that SHALL contain exactly one row, which contains information about the TPer's configuration. Table 225 LockingInfo Table Description | Column Number | Column Name | IsUnique | Column Type | |---------------|-------------------|----------|-----------------| | 0x00 | UID | | uid | | 0x01 | Name | | name | | 0x02 | Version | | uinteger_4 | | 0x03 | EncryptSupport | | enc_supported | | 0x04 | MaxRanges | | uinteger_4 | | 0x05 | MaxReEncryptions | | uinteger_4 | | 0x07 | KeysAvailableCfg | | keys_avail_conds|
5.7.2.1.1 UID This is the unique identifier of this row of the LockingInfo table. This column SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host.
5.7.2.1.2 Name This is the manufacturer-defined name for this feature. This column SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host.
5.7.2.1.3 Version This is a manufacturer-defined version number for this feature. This column SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host.

5.7.2.1.4 EncryptSupport This defines the types of encryption supported by this template. The value of this column is “None” if the drive does not support media encryption. This column SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host.

5.7.2.1.5 MaxRanges This value defines the maximum number of supportable LBA ranges in addition to the Global Range. If this value is 0, then the only range available is the entire Global Range of the Storage Device. This column SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host.

5.7.2.1.6 MaxReEncryptions This value defines the maximum number of simultaneous re-encryption operations supported. Simultaneous re-encryptions refer to the number of different LBA ranges that MAY be concurrently re- encrypted. A value of 0 indicates Re-encryption is not supported. This column SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host.

output_schema.label: PASS or FAIL
output_schema.rationale: short explanation grounded in source text
output_schema.concerns: empty string if none; otherwise state ambiguity
